summary: Iteration 14 testing complete - Both issues fixed: Hot Celebs Banner with card format at top, and price consistency when adding celebrities to team
passed_tests: Hot Celebs Banner appears at top of page (not scrolling ticker)
Hot Celebs shows 8 celebrity cards with photos, names, tiers, and prices
Hot Celebs endpoint returns celebs with all required fields (name, tier, price, image, hot_reason)
Price consistency: Hot Celeb card price matches search result price
Price consistency: Search result price matches team panel price after adding
Leonardo DiCaprio price fix verified - card shows £10.3M, team shows £10.3M (not £19M)
Budget correctly deducted when adding celebrity (£50M - celeb price)
All tier prices within valid ranges (A: £9-12M, B: £5-8M, C: £2-4M, D: £0.5-1.5M)
seed_data_creation: Created test teams: TEST_Price_Consistency_Team, TEST_Budget_Team, TEST_DiCaprio_Team
context_for_next_testing_agent: Price consistency fix verified - add_to_team endpoint now uses get_dynamic_price(tier, 50, name) to recalculate price instead of using stored DB price. Hot Celebs Banner component (HotCelebsBanner) replaced old scrolling ticker (HotCelebsTicker) at top of page. All prices now consistent across Hot Celebs cards, search results, and team panel.

issue_1_hot_celebs_banner.format: Card format with photos, names, tiers, prices

issue_2_price_mismatch.fix_description: add_to_team endpoint now recalculates price using get_dynamic_price(tier, default_buzz=50, name) instead of using stored price from DB
